scope: repository-wide PRF-013 protected merge boundary for rezahh107/EV4-Decision-Kernel
what_it_is: Branch-protection/ruleset configuration that must be applied outside Git after the external GitHub App check-run path is demonstrated on a test PR.
what_it_is_not: This file is not live GitHub branch protection evidence and does not itself enable required checks.
forbidden_configuration: Do not use any-source matching for PR Inspector / external-trust-result.
Do not require a pull_request_target base-bound job as the protected head result.
Do not merge PR #43 merely to install this guard.
Do not authorize proof credit or trusted ingestion.

activate_after: minimal separately reviewed default-branch bootstrap merge
test PR demonstrates a successful check run on the verified head SHA
test PR demonstrates same-name check from another source does not satisfy required PR Inspector source
new PR head invalidates the previous result
